'''Barsoulentinial Enkhet''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] who served as a member of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==Biography==
He was a member of [[Koris Haslam]]'s [[Commando/Legends|commando]] team and served in several missions, including the [[Mission to Selnesh|rescue]] of [[Gebnerret Vibrion]] from the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] prison on [[Selnesh/Legends|Selnesh]], where he disguised himself as a [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] to gain entry, and flew the team's [[Transport/Legends|transport]] during its escape from Imperial ships.

{{Char-stub}}
